title: Sid Meier's Starships

notes:
First instant run after downloading the game works fine. A 2nd start leads to showing Firaxis and K2 Logo and then you have an audio-loop. Game is not playable because of a black screen and audio-loop.
Renaming the exe (like other people mentioned) does not work, because Steam detects a "wrong" file and does an update first.
title: Sid Meier's Starships

cpu: AMD A8-7410 APU with AMD Radeon R5 Graphics
notes:
Game audio loops and stays at black screen after displaying game publisher's and developers logo.

Workaround: Replace Starship64.exe with Starship.exe to trick Steam to launch into 32bit version of the game.

Issue: Buttons are misaligned by half. Clicking the button half of a button will trigger the button below it. Only top half of the very top button can trigger that button.

Tip: Windowed fullscreen doesn't put the game into fullscreen in GNOME but helps with screen resolution in smaller displays (e.g. 720p)
title: Sid Meier's Starships

notes: Deleted /home/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Sid Meier's Starships/Starships64.exe. Renamed Starships.exe to Starships64.exe. Game Runs After it for more many hours perfectly.
